title: Crystal Touch 2oz Shot Glass Set - 100 Disposable, Durable Plastic Cups - Crystal Clear Dessert Cups for Birthday, Wedding, Anniversary Party Tasting
features: Mega-Value Drinking Glass Set: We offer you a set of high-end plastic drink glasses at a pocket-friendly price. Order these disposable shot glasses for your home kitchen or complement your cafe, hotel, or restaurant supplies.

Save Time On Glass Washing: These disposable cups will save you time and effort on washing. At the end of your wedding, anniversary, engagement, Christmas, or birthday party, just dispose of these plastic shot cups, lie back, and relax.

Serve Your Guests In Style: These sleek, clear glasses blend well with any type of decoration and make a great choice for any festive occasion. Order a plastic shot set for the upcoming bridal shower, baby shower, or wedding reception

Sturdy Drinking Shots For Any Drink: Made from durable plastic, our shot glasses are ideal for hot and cold beverages and can be reusable multiple times - as a wine tasting set, whisky glass, beer, or coffee cup set – or a set of jello shot cups.

Secure Packaging For Safe Shipping: We walk the extra mile to make sure our plastic party cups will reach you in excellent condition. Our disposable cup set is shipped in a sturdy box that protects the product from breakage.
description: Do Not Buy A Set Of Plastic Shot Glasses Before You Read This! Looking for a set of elegant cocktail cups or coffee cups for the garden BBQ? Need a set of shatter-proof dessert shot glasses for your kids? Introducing A Unique Reusable Cup Set By Crystal Touch! Now you don’t have to settle for flimsy plastic Martini glasses, unsafe slushy cups, or overpriced plastic cups for kids. Crystal Touch has released a set of novelty glasses for convenient use at home or the bar. These versatile shot plastic glasses are durable, unbreakable, ideal for outdoor parties, travels, and corporate events – and have a sleek crystal clear design that will elevate your decorations. Why Choose Our Front Door Outdoor Mat? Here Are The Top 3 Reasons! ✅ EASY TO CLEAN SHOT GLASSES: At the end of the party, instead of putting your vodka shots in the waste bin, you can wash them, dry them, and store them for future use. Help reduce pollution with these reusable cups. ✅ PERFECT SIZE FOR DRINKS AND DESSERTS: Have fun toasting the occasion with all your party guests. These shot glasses are perfect for any drink, but also great for small portions of condiments or desserts. ✅ FUSS-FREE PRESENTATION AT THE BAR: Select these clear plastic shot glasses in a set of 100 and up your presentation game at the café, snack bar, restaurant, hotel, or resort. Need More Reasons? ✔ Strong Jello Shot Cups – Kids Plastic Cups For School, Party, Summer Camp ✔ Clear Cups Match Easily All Types Of Plastic Cutlery ✔ Ideal For Events, Celebrations, Holidays – Safe Shot Glasses Plastic What You Get: 100 * Clear Plastic Shot Glasses Indulge Yourself!
